metadata.metaDescription: Sign in to the GLHF Study demo with any email.

attributes.title: Sign in
attributes.description: This is an interactive **demo**. Enter any email address to explore the participant portal — no verification email is sent and no data is stored.

accordionItems.title: Is this the real study?
accordionItems.content: No. This is a static demo of the participant portal. Nothing you enter here is saved or sent anywhere.

accordionItems.title: Can I link my Steam or Discord account?
accordionItems.content: Not in the demo. The account-linking buttons are shown but disabled so you can see how the real portal looks.
